write_stats.schema:
tokens: binary
n_tokens: int64
residual_q: binary
residual_scale: double
residual_shape: list<element: int64>
  child 0, element: int64
intermediate_q: binary
intermediate_scale: double
intermediate_shape: list<element: int64>
  child 0, element: int64
topk_ids: binary
topk_probs: binary
topk_shape: list<element: int64>
  child 0, element: int64
